settings_view.title: Settings
settings_view.portable_description: OxideTerm is running from a portable folder. Data stays beside the executable and automatic updates are disabled.

local_terminal.title: Local Terminal
local_terminal.description: Configure local terminal shell and preferences.
local_terminal.default_shell_hint: Shell to use when pressing Cmd+T
local_terminal.default_cwd_hint: Initial directory for new terminals (blank = home)
local_terminal.load_shell_profile_hint: Execute shell startup files (.bashrc, .zshrc, Profile.ps1, etc.)
local_terminal.oh_my_posh_enable_hint: Auto-initialize Oh My Posh prompt with UTF-8 encoding support
local_terminal.oh_my_posh_theme_hint: Path to Oh My Posh theme file (.omp.json), blank = default theme
local_terminal.oh_my_posh_note: Requires oh-my-posh to be installed. When enabled, PowerShell will auto-init UTF-8 and Oh My Posh
local_terminal.custom_env_hint: Additional environment variables to set (format: KEY=VALUE, one per line)

general.title: General
general.data_directory_hint: Location where connections, logs, and other data are stored
general.data_directory_changed: Data directory changed. Restart the app to apply.
general.reset_data_directory_confirm: Reset data directory to default? Existing data at the custom location will not be moved. Restart required.
general.data_directory_reset: Data directory reset to default. Restart the app to apply.
general.data_directory_restart_notice: Changing the data directory requires an app restart. Existing data is not automatically migrated.
general.data_directory_conflict_detail: The selected directory already contains OxideTerm data files: {{files}}. These files may be overwritten. Continue?
general.portable_runtime_hint: This portable profile is running from a local folder with an instance lock and portable keystore state managed beside the app.
general.portable_runtime_disabled_hint: Portable runtime controls are only available when OxideTerm starts from a portable marker or portable.json beside the app.
general.portable_instance_lock_unavailable: No portable instance lock is active
general.portable_biometric_bound: This portable folder is bound to OS biometrics on this device.
general.portable_biometric_unbound: No biometric unlock is bound yet. You can opt in without changing the portable storage format.
general.portable_biometric_unsupported: Biometric unlock is not available on this device. Portable mode continues to work with the local password only.
general.portable_disable_biometric_confirm: Remove the biometric binding for this portable folder on this device? The portable password will still work normally.
general.portable_biometric_enabled: Biometric unlock enabled for this portable folder.
general.portable_biometric_disabled: Biometric unlock disabled for this portable folder.
general.portable_change_password_description: Re-encrypt the portable keystore with a new password. If biometric unlock is already bound on this device, OxideTerm will update that binding as well.
general.portable_enable_biometric_description: Confirm the current portable password once to store a biometric-gated unlock on this device. The portable folder itself still remains password-based and portable.
general.portable_password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
general.portable_migration_installed_hint: Create a portable-ready .oxide bundle from this installed profile, including portable secrets that can be restored safely.
general.portable_migration_portable_hint: Import a portable .oxide bundle back into this profile and restore portable secrets such as AI provider keys.
general.portable_migration_secret_summary: Portable secret items available for migration: {{count}}
general.cli_tool_hint: Install the oxt CLI to manage connections from your terminal
general.cli_not_bundled: CLI binary is not included in this build
general.cli_reinstall_hint: The installed CLI differs from the bundled CLI for OxideTerm {{version}}. Reinstall the bundled CLI to avoid protocol mismatches.

terminal.title: Terminal Settings
terminal.description: Configure appearance and behavior of the terminal emulator.
terminal.custom_font_stack_hint: Enter font names in priority order, separated by commas
terminal.encoding_hint: Text encoding for terminal input/output. Keep UTF-8 unless the remote host uses a legacy locale.
terminal.renderer_hint: Choose WebGL or Canvas rendering. On Linux, Auto prefers WebGL but falls back to Canvas when software WebGL or unsafe WebKitGTK paths are detected.
terminal.adaptive_renderer_hint: Automatically adjusts rendering rate based on activity: Boost (120Hz+) during fast output, Normal (60Hz) for typing, Idle (1-15Hz) when inactive
terminal.show_fps_overlay_hint: Display a live render-tier badge (B=boost, N=normal, I=idle), frame rate, and write rate in the terminal corner
terminal.paste_protection_hint: Confirm before pasting multi-line content to prevent accidental command execution
terminal.osc52_clipboard_hint: Allow remote programs (tmux, vim) to write to system clipboard via OSC 52 escape sequence
terminal.copy_on_select_hint: Automatically copy terminal text to the system clipboard once a mouse selection settles
terminal.middle_click_paste_hint: Paste the current clipboard contents with middle click when the terminal is not in mouse-tracking mode
terminal.selection_requires_shift_hint: When enabled, plain drag keeps terminal interaction intact and only Shift + drag starts a text selection

in_band_transfer.title: In-Band File Transfer
in_band_transfer.enabled_hint: Handle trzsz upload and download sequences directly inside the terminal session.
in_band_transfer.allow_directory_hint: When disabled, folder uploads and downloads are rejected before transfer starts.
in_band_transfer.max_chunk_bytes_hint: Upper limit for each trzsz data chunk in bytes.
in_band_transfer.max_file_count_hint: Maximum number of files accepted in a single transfer.
in_band_transfer.max_total_bytes_hint: Maximum cumulative transfer size in bytes for one transfer session.
in_band_transfer.runtime_note: Enabling or disabling trzsz takes effect immediately. Directory and size limits apply to the next transfer that starts after the change.

terminal.smart_copy_hint: On Windows and Linux, copy the current selection with Ctrl+C and only send SIGINT when nothing is selected
terminal.scrollback_hint: Number of lines kept in memory for scrolling
terminal.backend_buffer_lines_hint: Lines kept in the backend per SSH terminal for reconnect and search.
terminal.bg_enabled_hint: Master switch — turn off to disable background image without deleting images
terminal.bg_hint: Upload images to the gallery. Click to activate, supports PNG, JPEG, WebP, and animated GIF.
terminal.bg_opacity_hint: How visible the background image is (lower = subtler)
terminal.bg_blur_hint: Blur the background image (auto-capped on integrated GPUs)
terminal.bg_fit_hint: How the image fills the terminal area
terminal.bg_tabs_hint: Choose which tab types show the background image

highlight_rules.title: Highlight Rules
highlight_rules.description: Persist keyword or regex-based highlights for terminal output. Higher rules win when matches overlap.
highlight_rules.priority_hint: Drag to reorder priority from top to bottom.
highlight_rules.empty: No highlight rules yet. Add a rule or start from a preset.
highlight_rules.preview_hint: Matches are resolved with the same priority rules used in the terminal.
highlight_rules.label: Label
highlight_rules.toast_auto_disabled_description: {{count}} rule was disabled automatically because matching failed: {{reason}}.
highlight_rules.preview_line_warning: warning: retrying ssh connection to 10.0.0.25:2222 via https://gateway.example.com
highlight_rules.preview_line_audit: audit: admin@example.com downloaded package from cdn.example.com with sha256 9f86d081884c7d659a2feaa0c55ad015a3bf4f1b2b0b822cd15d6c15b0f00a08

mode_hint.literal: Literal mode matches plain text exactly as written.
mode_hint.regex: Regex mode uses RE2-compatible syntax for safe matching.

validation.empty-pattern: Enter a keyword or regex pattern.
validation.unsupported-regex-syntax: This regex uses syntax that RE2 does not support.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.layout_hint: Sidebar can be resized by dragging its right edge. Use the collapse button (◧) to hide it.
appearance.density_hint: Control spacing and padding throughout the interface
appearance.border_radius_hint: Global corner roundness for UI elements
appearance.ui_font_hint: Custom font for the application interface. Leave empty for system default.
appearance.frosted_glass_hint: Apply translucent blur effect to panels

custom_theme.description: Customize terminal and UI colors to create your own theme.
custom_theme.name: Theme Name

idle_timeout.title: Connection Pool
idle_timeout.description: Configure how idle SSH connections are managed.
idle_timeout.label: Idle Timeout
idle_timeout.hint: SSH connections with no open terminals will be disconnected after this period. Set to 'Never' to keep connections alive indefinitely.
idle_timeout.save_failed: Failed to save idle timeout setting

ssh_keys.title: SSH Keys
ssh_keys.description: Manage local SSH keys detected in ~/.ssh/
ssh_keys.no_keys: No keys found in default location.

ai.title: OxideSens
ai.description: Configure OpenAI-compatible API and context limits.
ai.enable_hint: Enable inline chat and context analysis
ai.privacy_text: All requests are initiated locally. API keys are stored in the system keychain. Only selected terminal context is sent to the configured endpoint.
ai.max_context_hint: Maximum characters to send for analysis.
ai.buffer_history_hint: How many lines of terminal output to include.
ai.context_source_ide_hint: Include open files and project info from IDE mode in AI context.
ai.context_source_sftp_hint: Include current directory and selected files from file browser in AI context.
ai.embedding_description: Configure a dedicated embedding model for the Knowledge Base. This is separate from the chat model.
ai.click_to_set_default: Click to set as default model
ai.system_prompt_placeholder: Enter a custom system prompt... (leave empty to use default)
ai.system_prompt_hint: Customize OxideSens's behavior. Leave empty to use the default OxideSens prompt.
ai.max_response_tokens_hint: Maximum tokens the AI can use for its response. Leave empty for automatic calculation.
ai.reasoning_hint: Used when a provider or model does not override it. Unsupported providers ignore this setting.
ai.model_reasoning_overrides_hint: Optional per-model thinking depth. Leave inherited unless a specific model needs different behavior.
ai.model_reasoning_overrides_empty: Refresh models for each provider before configuring model reasoning.
ai.model_context_windows_hint: Override the detected context window size for each model. User values take precedence over API results and built-in rules.
ai.model_context_windows_empty: Refresh models for each provider before configuring context windows.
ai.tool_use_enabled_hint: Allow the AI to execute commands, read files, and perform actions on remote servers via function calling.
ai.tool_use_approve_hint: Select which tools the AI can use without confirmation. Tools not selected here will ask for confirmation before running.
ai.tool_use_disabled_tools_hint: These tools will not be exposed to OxideSens. This state usually comes from the legacy in-chat tool switcher or safety debugging.
ai.tool_use_max_rounds_hint: Maximum tool/model round trips per reply before OxideSens stops the loop. Default: 10.
ai.tool_use_policy_summary: Read-only actions are automatic; execution, writes, settings changes, and transfers follow the approval policy below.
ai.tool_policy_read_desc: Targets, terminal observation, settings reads, and preference recall are always allowed automatically.
ai.tool_policy_execute_desc: Allow run_command without asking each time. Destructive commands still require confirmation.
ai.tool_policy_interactive_desc: Allow sending input to visible terminals, including Enter and control sequences.
ai.tool_policy_write_desc: Choose which write-like actions can run without asking each time.
ai.tool_policy_navigation_desc: Choose whether OxideSens can connect targets or just open UI surfaces without asking.
ai.tool_policy_warning: Default mode requires approval for dangerous commands. Bypass mode can skip that approval only for the current chat after explicit confirmation. Passwords, sudo prompts, passphrases, and credentials must still be handled by you.
ai.tool_use_write_warning: Write tools grant the AI command execution and file modification capabilities. Enable only on trusted servers.
ai.memory_enabled_hint: Inject these long-lived preferences into AI chats. The content stays local until you send a message.
ai.memory_placeholder:
- Prefer concise Chinese replies.
- Explain the plan before large code changes.
- I care about terminal rendering and SSH performance.
ai.memory_hint: Use this for stable preferences only. Avoid secrets, passwords, tokens, or one-off task facts. Current chat instructions always take priority.
ai.tool_policy_interactive_send_input: Send text, Enter, and control sequences

sftp.title: SFTP Transfer
sftp.description: Configure file transfer behavior and performance.
sftp.directory_parallelism_hint: Number of files transferred at the same time during recursive folder upload or download. Falls back to serial when speed limiting is enabled.

ide.title: IDE Mode (Mini)
ide.description: Configure the built-in code editor behavior.
ide.auto_save_hint: Automatically save files when switching tabs or losing focus.
ide.word_wrap_hint: Wrap long lines instead of horizontal scrolling.
ide.agent_description: OxideTerm can deploy a lightweight agent binary to remote hosts for enhanced IDE performance. The agent provides POSIX-native file operations, real-time file watching, and faster search — all running locally on the remote server.
ide.agent_feature_atomic: Atomic file writes (no data loss on network disruption)
ide.agent_feature_watch: Real-time file watching via inotify (instant refresh)
ide.agent_feature_hash: Hash-based conflict detection (prevents overwriting external changes)
ide.agent_feature_search: Server-side grep and deep directory tree loading
ide.agent_auto_hint: When opening IDE mode on supported Linux x86_64/aarch64 hosts, the agent is deployed based on the policy below — you will be prompted to confirm on first use (or deploy automatically if set to 'Always Enable').
ide.agent_extra_hint: Prebuilt binaries are no longer provided for other architectures. Build the agent from source yourself, then manually upload it to ~/.oxideterm/oxideterm-agent on the remote host.
ide.agent_path_detail: The agent binary is placed at ~/.oxideterm/oxideterm-agent in the remote user's home directory.
ide.agent_lifecycle_detail: Deployed on first IDE mode open and persists between sessions. Automatically updated when a new version is available. Can be safely deleted at any time — it will be re-deployed when needed.
ide.agent_privacy_detail: The agent is a standalone binary that communicates exclusively with OxideTerm over the existing SSH connection (stdio). It makes no third-party network connections, sends no telemetry, and collects no data.
ide.editor_typography_hint: Override terminal font size and line height for the code editor. Leave empty to follow terminal settings.
ide.font_size_hint: Editor font size in pixels. Empty = follow terminal.
ide.line_height_hint: Editor line spacing. Empty = follow terminal.
ide.agent_mode_hint: Control whether OxideTerm deploys the agent to remote hosts when opening IDE mode.

ai_confirm.title: Enable AI Capabilities?
ai_confirm.description: Confirm enabling AI features for terminal context analysis.
ai_confirm.intro: This will allow OxideTerm to send selected terminal context to your configured AI endpoint.
ai_confirm.point_local: All requests are initiated directly from your local machine
ai_confirm.point_no_server: No intermediate server is used (unless configured otherwise)
ai_confirm.point_context: Only text you specifically select or query is sent to the API

help.title: Help & About
help.description: Application information, keyboard shortcuts, and resources.
help.open_logs_hint: Open the application log directory in your file manager
help.license: OxideTerm is open source software licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0 (GPL-3.0)
help.update_available_toast: A new version is available. Go to Settings → Help to update.
help.portable_mode_hint: This session is using the portable bootstrap flow and keeps its data next to the executable.
help.updates_manual_only_hint: Automatic update checks and in-app installs are disabled in portable mode. Replace the portable folder with a newer OxideTerm build to update.

errors.import_success: Successfully imported "{{name}}" as a saved connection!

mcp.title: MCP Servers
mcp.description: Connect to Model Context Protocol servers to extend AI capabilities with external tools.
mcp.no_servers: No MCP servers configured. Add a server to get started.
mcp.add_server_description: Configure a new MCP server connection.
mcp.extra_headers_hint: Extra headers are stored as normal settings. Put secrets in the auth token field.

reconnect.title: Auto-Reconnect
reconnect.description: Configure automatic reconnection behavior when SSH connections are lost.
reconnect.enabled_hint: Automatically attempt to restore connections when network interruptions are detected.
reconnect.max_attempts_hint: Maximum number of reconnection attempts before giving up.
reconnect.base_delay_hint: Initial wait time before the first retry attempt.
reconnect.max_delay_hint: Upper limit for retry delay with exponential backoff.
reconnect.formula_hint: Retries use exponential backoff with jitter: each subsequent attempt waits longer (up to the max delay), with a small random variation to avoid thundering herd.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.description: Import and manage operations documentation for AI-powered retrieval. Documents are indexed and can be automatically referenced during OxideSens chat.
knowledge.create_description: Create a new document collection. Collections group related documents together.
knowledge.no_collections: No collections yet. Create one to start importing documents.
knowledge.semantic_search_description: Optional vector search for the Knowledge Base. Keyword search works without embeddings.
knowledge.embedding_provider_unsupported: Selected provider does not support embeddings
knowledge.no_documents: No documents in this collection. Import Markdown or text files to get started.
knowledge.delete_collection_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete collection "{{name}}"? This will remove all documents and indexes.
knowledge.delete_document_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete document "{{name}}"?
knowledge.error_no_embedding_support: Selected provider does not support embeddings. Configure an Embedding Provider in Knowledge Base settings.
knowledge.error_no_embedding_model: No embedding model configured. Set an Embedding Model in Knowledge Base settings.
knowledge.error_no_embedding_api_key: No API key configured for the selected embedding provider.
knowledge.new_document_description: Create a blank document that you can edit externally.
knowledge.stats_stale: Stats may be out of date

keybindings.title: Keybindings
keybindings.description: Customize keyboard shortcuts for all actions.
keybindings.intl_keyboard_note: On international keyboard layouts (e.g. French, German), symbol shortcuts (such as ⌘/Ctrl+[ ] \ |) are automatically normalized for cross-layout compatibility. To bind Alt-specific actions, please use non-symbol keys instead.
keybindings.reset_all_confirm: Reset all keyboard shortcuts to their defaults? This cannot be undone.
